skill: Nonlinear equations in one variable and systems of equations in two variables
stem: In the xy-plane, the graph of y = −x² + 7x − 80 intersects the line y = k at exactly one point. What is the value of k?
rationale: Choice B is correct. The line y = k intersects the parabola exactly once when k equals the parabola's maximum (since the parabola opens downward). The maximum of y = −x² + 7x − 80 occurs at x = 7/2. Substituting: y = −(7/2)² + 7(7/2) − 80 = −49/4 + 49/2 − 80 = 49/4 − 80 = (49 − 320)/4 = −271/4.
